facebook.caption:
4.6 stars. 329 reviews. One little ice cream café on Đường Bạch Đằng that most tourists scroll right past.

Buddy Ice Cream & Cafe keeps showing up in local recommendations for a reason. Chill vibe, solid coffee, and ice cream worth detour-level effort.

If you're staying near the center of Phú Quốc, this one's already close. No excuse to skip it.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Scoops, iced coffee, and 329 people who all said the same thing: worth it. Buddy Ice Cream & Cafe on Đường Bạch Đằng. Small spot. Big rating. Go.
